description: A housekeeper arrives at a room to clean it but sees the 'Do Not Disturb' sign on the door.

nodes.task_description: The housekeeper respects the sign and does not enter the room.
The housekeeper updates the room status in their device to 'Do Not Disturb'.

expected_outcome.value: The room status is accurately reflected in the system.

nodes.task_description: The housekeeper continues to the next room on their list and will check back on the DND room later in their shift.

expected_outcome.value: The workflow is adjusted according to policy.
